Product Features

  • [Space Saving] The wall-mounted bathroom mirror cabinet is an ideal storage solution for the home. The storage cabinet is suitable for bathrooms, bedrooms and living rooms. It can be assembled stably and safely on the wall or above the toilet, providing additional storage space without taking up valuable floor space.
  • [Adjustable Shelf Height] The simple style bathroom cabinet perfectly fits the needs of life. Since the internal shelves can be adjusted to the appropriate height, items of different heights can be stored, such as storing sanitary products, toiletries, and sometimes medicines.
  • [High-quality mirror medicine cabinet] Our wall-mounted bathroom mirror cabinet uses high-definition glass to provide a clear and bright view, illuminating your beauty and handsomeness. The bathroom mirror with storage function adopts high-quality MDF panel, and the waterproof and moisture-proof spray paint process protects the wall cabinet from moisture and water, which is very suitable for safe use in humid environments such as bathrooms.
  • [Mirror Cabinet] The wall-mounted cabinet with mirror can save you extra time in picking mirrors. At the same time, the mirror cabinet can meet your multiple needs. You can use it as a storage cabinet or as a makeup mirror.
  • [Easy to Assemble] The bathroom medicine cabinet with mirror requires assembly. Don't worry, all necessary accessories are included in the package, along with illustrated instructions.

Descriptions

Bathroom Wall Cabinet with Mirror, Wall Mounted Medicine Cabinet with Open Shelf

This wall-mounted mirror cabinet combines high-quality MDF panels and high-definition mirrors to create a sturdy and beautiful home storage solution. The exquisite mirror provides clear reflections, making your daily grooming more convenient. The unique design combines hidden storage and open shelves to meet different storage needs. Three large storage cabinets can easily hide personal items and keep the space neat and organized; adjustable shelves provide flexible storage space for various items to adapt to your changing needs. Whether in the bathroom, bedroom or living room, this mirror cabinet can be perfectly integrated, adding fashion and practicality to your home.

Exquisite and Durable Hardware

Combining high-quality materials and exquisite craftsmanship, it ensures long-lasting use and excellent performance. Whether it is door handles, hinges or drawer slides, they can show modern beauty and practicality.

Modern Minimalist Style

The simple lines and elegant appearance make this mirror cabinet perfectly integrated into various home styles, from modern, Nordic to minimalist styles, which can be easily matched to enhance your home taste.

Multiple Storage Space

The bathroom wall cabinet features a closed cabinet with 1 mirror door and two side cabinets for storing and displaying more bathroom supplies. The cabinet has open shelf and strong load-bearing capacity
